name: Lemon Sorbet and Raspberry Coulis
recipeIngredient: 6 medium very ripe unpeeled peaches, halved and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and 3/4 cup sugar in a small saucepan; stir well. Bring to a boil, and cook for 1 minute or until the sugar dissolves, stirring constantly.
2. Pour into an 11 x 7-inch baking dish, and chill.
3. Place 2 cups raspberries, 1/3 cup sugar, and vinegar in a food processor, and process until smooth. Strain through a sieve into a bowl; discard seeds. Cover raspberry mixture, and chill.
4. Add lemon juice and orange juice to chilled sugar syrup in baking dish; stir with a wire whisk until blended.
5. Freeze 4 hours or until firm.
6. Place peach halves, skin sides up, on a jelly-roll pan. Bake at 450 degrees for 4 minutes. Let cool, and peel off skins.
7. Spoon 1-1/2 tablespoons raspberry mixture into each of 6 dessert dishes; top with sorbet and 2 peach halves.
